query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN titleEs IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sin_traduccion FROM special_cases; SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN titleEs IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sin_traduccion FROM documents;
